sites.name: Regional Unemployment (AU)
sites.description: The unemployment rate for every Australian local government area — 15 years of official Small Area Labour Markets data, mapped, ranked and charted, with hotspots and trends surfaced automatically.

sites.name: Pokies Losses (NSW)
sites.description: How much each NSW council area loses to poker machines — clubs and hotels ranked, mapped and tracked over six years, with loss-per-adult comparisons for all 128 LGAs.

sites.name: Gender Pay Gap (AU)
sites.description: Search the gender pay gap at 8,600+ Australian employers — official WGEA data ranked, compared to industry and national medians, tracked year-on-year, and broken down by pay quartile.

sites.name: Government Contracts (AU)
sites.description: Follow the public money — every Australian federal government contract for FY2025-26, with supplier and agency leaderboards, a relationship network, spend-flow, state map and a searchable database.

sites.name: Pokies Losses (AU)
sites.description: How much your community loses to poker machines — Australian pokies losses by Local Government Area, ranked per-adult, mapped, and compared across states.

sites.name: Machinery of Government (AU)
sites.description: Interactive map of the Australian Government — every department, agency, statutory body and public entity across 17 portfolios, with a Cabinet view, treemap, matrix, relationship graph, map, timeline, searchable table, and auto-computed insights.

sites.name: Flight Delays (AU)
sites.description: Which Australian domestic flights run on time? Compare every major route and airline by on-time arrivals, delays and cancellations — 22 years of official BITRE data, mapped and searchable.

sites.name: Pullshark
sites.description: Discover open-source products trending on GitHub, ranked daily by an HN-style decay.

sites.name: Childcare Watch (AU)
sites.description: Search and compare every Australian childcare and early-learning service — NQS ratings, all seven Quality Area sub-scores, provider chains, leaderboards, and rating-change tracking.

sites.name: Charity Watch (AU)
sites.description: Look up any of Australia's 65,000+ registered charities — sector, finances, where money comes from and goes, plus auto-detected anomalies.

sites.name: NDIS Watch (AU)
sites.description: Search every NDIS Commission compliance action — banning orders, registration revocations, suspensions, and notices against Australian disability providers and workers — by name, state, and severity.

sites.name: Aged Care Quality (AU)
sites.description: Search and compare every Australian residential aged care home — Star Ratings, staffing, resident surveys, and quality measures from official government data.

sites.name: Leader Skills
sites.description: Explore well-documented leaders, then build your own leadership operating system.

sites.name: World Cup Invitations
sites.description: Disguise every 2026 World Cup knockout match as a believable work meeting — pick your profession, browse the full bracket, and download one calendar file so you can watch in peace.

sites.name: DSN Watch
sites.description: Live view of NASA's Deep Space Network — every antenna, every spacecraft, right now. A consumer-friendly reimagining of NASA's DSN Now dashboard.

sites.name: Crime Statistics (AU)
sites.description: Explore and compare crime statistics across every Australian state and territory — standardised ANZSOC categories, per-capita rates, and auto-detected anomalies in one interactive dashboard.

sites.name: Development Applications (AU)
sites.description: Unified planning and development application explorer across Australian councils — search, filter, and visualise DAs by type, status, suburb, and processing time.

sites.name: Road Crashes (AU)
sites.description: Interactive explorer for 58,000+ Australian road fatality records (1989–2026) from the BITRE ARDD — trends, maps, demographics, and temporal heatmaps.

sites.name: Political Donations (AU)
sites.description: Searchable Australian political donations explorer unifying the AEC Transparency Register and all state/territory disclosure registers into one interface with filters, aggregates, and jurisdiction comparison.

sites.name: Hospital Performance (AU)
sites.description: Searchable Australian hospital performance explorer — ED 4-hour departure rates, triage response times, and elective surgery waits for 1,400+ hospitals via AIHW MyHospitals API.

sites.name: NEMWatch (AU)
sites.description: Live Australian electricity spot prices and grid demand for all NEM regions, updated every 5 minutes from AEMO data.

sites.name: Dam Levels (AU)
sites.description: Live storage levels for 26 major Australian dams and reservoirs via Bureau of Meteorology Water Data Online.

sites.name: ThreatGlobe
sites.description: Real-time global cyber threat observatory with interactive 3D globe.

sites.name: Artemis Tracker
sites.description: Real-time Artemis mission tracker with 3D trajectory visualization.

sites.name: Dropwell
sites.description: End-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer file sharing in the browser.

sites.name: Tariff Check
sites.description: Tariff impact checker for international trade.

sites.name: Fire Watch (AU)
sites.description: Australian bushfire watch and monitoring dashboard.

sites.name: CrimeAware (AU)
sites.description: iOS crime statistics map for Australia (NSW and Victoria).

sites.name: Leaf Log
sites.description: Plant care and leaf tracking log.

sites.name: MedTriage
sites.description: Medical triage decision support tool.

sites.name: Control Room
sites.description: Control room organization tool.

sites.name: Pace Calc
sites.description: Running pace calculator.

sites.name: Stashed
sites.description: Stash manager for organizing and tracking items.

sites.name: Due Back
sites.description: Due date and return tracker.
